description: Fetching and analyzing AlphaFold structural prediction and confidence scores for B7FXQ8 HSP20A
code:
import requests
import json

# Check AlphaFold database for B7FXQ8
af_url = "https://alphafold.ebi.ac.uk/api/prediction/B7FXQ8"
resp = requests.get(af_url)
if resp.status_code == 200:
    af_data = resp.json()
    if isinstance(af_data, list):
        af_data = af_data[0]
    print("=== AlphaFold prediction available ===")
    print(f"UniProt: {af_data.get('uniprotAccession', 'N/A')}")
    print(f"Model URL: {af_data.get('pdbUrl', 'N/A')}")
    print(f"Confidence URL: {af_data.get('cifUrl', 'N/A')}")
    
    # Download pLDDT scores from the PDB file
    pdb_url = af_data.get('pdbUrl', '')
    if pdb_url:
        pdb_resp = requests.get(pdb_url)
        pdb_text = pdb_resp.text
        
        # Extract pLDDT from B-factor column of ATOM records
        plddt_scores = []
        residue_numbers = []
        for line in pdb_text.split('\n'):
            if line.startswith('ATOM') and line[12:16].strip() == 'CA':
                resnum = int(line[22:26].strip())
                bfactor = float(line[60:66].strip())
                plddt_scores.append(bfactor)
                residue_numbers.append(resnum)
        
        import numpy as np
        plddt_array = np.array(plddt_scores)
        resnum_array = np.array(residue_numbers)
        
        print(f"\n=== pLDDT confidence scores ===")
        print(f"Mean pLDDT: {np.mean(plddt_array):.1f}")
        print(f"Median pLDDT: {np.median(plddt_array):.1f}")
        print(f"Min pLDDT: {np.min(plddt_array):.1f} at residue {resnum_array[np.argmin(plddt_array)]}")
        print(f"Max pLDDT: {np.max(plddt_array):.1f} at residue {resnum_array[np.argmax(plddt_array)]}")
        
        # Per-region analysis
        n_term = plddt_array[resnum_array <= 46]
        acd = plddt_array[(resnum_array >= 47) & (resnum_array <= 155)]
        c_term = plddt_array[resnum_array >= 156]
        
        print(f"\nRegion-specific pLDDT:")
        print(f"  N-terminal extension (1-46): {np.mean(n_term):.1f} ± {np.std(n_term):.1f}")
        print(f"  ACD domain (47-155): {np.mean(acd):.1f} ± {np.std(acd):.1f}")
        print(f"  C-terminal extension (156-163): {np.mean(c_term):.1f} ± {np.std(c_term):.1f}")
        
        # Confidence categories
        very_high = np.sum(plddt_array > 90)
        confident = np.sum((plddt_array > 70) & (plddt_array <= 90))
        low = np.sum((plddt_array > 50) & (plddt_array <= 70))
        very_low = np.sum(plddt_array <= 50)
        
        print(f"\nConfidence distribution:")
        print(f"  Very high (>90): {very_high}/{len(plddt_array)} ({100*very_high/len(plddt_array):.1f}%)")
        print(f"  Confident (70-90): {confident}/{len(plddt_array)} ({100*confident/len(plddt_array):.1f}%)")
        print(f"  Low (50-70): {low}/{len(plddt_array)} ({100*low/len(plddt_array):.1f}%)")
        print(f"  Very low (<50): {very_low}/{len(plddt_array)} ({100*very_low/len(plddt_array):.1f}%)")
        
        # Plot
        import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
        fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 4))
        
        # Color by confidence
        colors = []
        for s in plddt_array:
            if s > 90: colors.append('#0053D6')
            elif s > 70: colors.append('#65CBF3')
            elif s > 50: colors.append('#FFDB13')
            else: colors.append('#FF7D45')
        
        ax.bar(resnum_array, plddt_array, color=colors, width=1.0)
        ax.axhline(y=70, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
        ax.axhline(y=90, color='gray', linestyle='--', alpha=0.5)
        
        # Domain boundaries
        ax.axvline(x=46.5, color='red', linestyle='-', alpha=0.7, label='Domain boundaries')
        ax.axvline(x=155.5, color='red', linestyle='-', alpha=0.7)
        
        ax.set_xlabel('Residue number')
        ax.set_ylabel('pLDDT score')
        ax.set_title('AlphaFold pLDDT Confidence - B7FXQ8 HSP20A (P. tricornutum)')
        ax.set_ylim(0, 100)
        ax.text(23, 95, 'N-term', ha='center', fontsize=9)
        ax.text(101, 95, 'ACD domain', ha='center', fontsize=9)
        ax.text(159, 95, 'C-term', ha='center', fontsize=9)
        
        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.savefig('alphafold_plddt_B7FXQ8.png', dpi=150)
        plt.show()
        print("\nPlot saved.")
else:
    print(f"AlphaFold prediction not available (status: {resp.status_code})")
